nodes.label: Zaid Digital Full Logo
nodes.rationale: Gold 8-point star coin emblem on dark background with serif ZD monogram and 'ZAID DIGITAL · PREMIUM WEBDESIGN' wordmark; gold accent (#D4A017), dark luxury palette, animated glow and rotating ring.

nodes.label: Dark-Luxury-Branding
nodes.rationale: Premium brand identity built on a dark background with a gold accent (#D4A017), serif typography, and star/coin emblem conveying exclusivity and luxury web design positioning.
